title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft revealed seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, MDASH, and Majorana 2, positioning itself as both partner and competitor to OpenAI. The models span reasoning capabilities, agent technology, and quantum hardware, representing a full-stack AI strategy.
